feat.name: Guardian's Deflection (Fighter)
feat.text: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their Armor Class against the triggering attack. This turns the triggering critical hit into a hit, or the triggering hit into a miss.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

feat.trigger: An ally within your melee reach is hit by an attack, you can see the attacker, and the ally gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC would turn the critical hit into a hit or the hit into a miss
feat.requirement: You are wielding a single one-handed melee weapon and hold nothing else in your hands.
